title: Gift Card Flexibility

They are not interested in cleaning products, tinting services, or aftermarket window films that are difficult to remove. Relevance is determined by products or methods specifically designed for child safety, ease of use, and proven thermal/UV reduction without permanent modification to the vehicle.

title: Petit Bateau Gift Cards

title: Collaborator Cars

title: Military Ethics
description: How did post-WWI German military officers like Hermann Göring reconcile personal honor and chivalry in combat with later involvement in unethical regimes?
narrative: The user seeks to understand the psychological and ethical transition of military professionals who demonstrated battlefield integrity—such as Göring’s chivalrous conduct as a WWI fighter ace—yet later became central figures in morally reprehensible regimes. Relevant documents should explore the tension between professional military ethics, wartime codes of conduct, and political radicalization, particularly in the context of interwar Germany. Irrelevant documents about modern alliances, IRSEM reports, or institutional directories do not address this nuanced inquiry into moral evolution within military elites.

title: Unemployment Option
description: How does the right of option work for French unemployment beneficiaries deciding between retaining existing benefits or switching to newly earned, higher-paying benefits?
narrative: The user is an unemployed individual in France who has returned to work and now qualifies for new unemployment benefits under Pôle Emploi’s reloadable rights system. They are weighing whether to exercise their 'right of option'—which allows them to forfeit remaining lower benefits in exchange for higher payments based on their most recent employment—while considering factors like duration of compensation, income needs, and future job prospects. Relevant documents must explain the eligibility criteria (e.g., 30% income increase threshold, 4+ months of work), the irreversible nature of the choice, and the financial trade-offs between shorter, higher payments versus longer, lower ones. Documents that discuss real-life implications, personal case studies, or administrative procedures for applying for the option are relevant; generic descriptions of unemployment benefits without addressing the option mechanism are not.

title: Insurance Portal Access
